practice.task: Select all employees ordered by salary from highest to lowest.
practice.title: Employees by Salary
practice.code:
-- TODO: Write a query with ORDER BY
-- Table: employees (id, name, salary)

solutionCode: SELECT name, salary FROM employees ORDER BY salary DESC;
meta:
TITLE: Employees by Salary
TASK: Select all employees ordered by salary descending.
EXPECTED_OUTPUT: Bob|60000
Charlie|55000
Alice|50000
HINT: Use ORDER BY column DESC.

variants.label: correct
variants.code: SELECT name, salary FROM employees ORDER BY salary DESC;
